title: tater - hierarchical
description: Pet/animal ontology with tags, compact, and full hierarchical label widgets.
instructions:
## Navigation

- Use **chevron buttons** (→) to explore the ontology
- Use **search** to find breeds by name
- Expand/collapse branches with the tree UI

**Tags Breed** uses tags view (path shown as dismissible pills).
**Primary Breed** uses compact view (shows only selected).
**Secondary Breed** uses full view (shows all siblings).

data_schema.label: Tags Breed
data_schema.description: Navigate via pill tags — click a tag to go back, × to deselect.

data_schema.label: Primary Breed
data_schema.description: Navigate the ontology to select a breed or type.

data_schema.label: Secondary Breed (Mixed)
data_schema.description: Select a secondary breed if the pet is a mix.
